synced:
[00:09.69] The club isn't the best place to find a lover
[00:12.18] So the bar is where I go (mm-mm)
[00:14.83] Me and my friends at the table doing shots
[00:17.06] Drinking fast, and then we talk slow (mm-mm)
[00:19.70] You come over and start up a conversation with just me
[00:22.27] And trust me, I'll give it a chance now (mm-mm)
[00:24.48] Take my hand, stop, put "Van the Man" on the jukebox
[00:27.21] And then we start to dance
[00:28.97] And now I'm singing like
[00:29.80] Girl, you know I want your love
[00:32.25] Your love was handmade for somebody like me
[00:35.24] Come on now, follow my lead
[00:37.35] I may be crazy, don't mind me
[00:39.67] Say, "Boy, let's not talk too much
[00:42.27] Grab on my waist and put that body on me"
[00:45.34] Come on now, follow my lead
[00:47.27] Come, come on now, follow my lead
[00:49.17] (Mm-mm)
[00:50.78] I'm in love with the shape of you

The club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (mm-mm)
Me and my friends at the table doing shots
Drinking fast, and then we talk slow (mm-mm)
You come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me, I'll give it a chance now (mm-mm)
Take my hand, stop, put "Van the Man" on the jukebox
And then we start to dance
And now I'm singing like

Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me

Grab on my waist and put that body on me"
Come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead
(Mm-mm)

I'm in love with the shape of you

And now my bed sheets smell like you
